About Me

A story still
being written

"I believe every life is a canvas — shaped by faith, coloured by love, and defined by the stories we choose to tell."

Hi, I'm Sneha — a dreamer, creator, and believer. I find beauty in small moments: golden-hour light, handwritten notes, and honest conversations over warm tea. My faith guides everything I do, and my heart is forever grateful.

Whether I'm capturing memories through a lens, penning down thoughts, or simply being present — I strive to do it all with purpose and warmth.
